message:
Add statistics summary in verbose mode (bd-2tr)

Enhances verbose output with a detailed statistics summary:

- Enhanced Stats struct with timing, blocks_skipped, revisions_skipped
- New print_stats_summary() function for formatted output
- Timing measurement in correct_lines()
- BlockCorrectionResult struct to track applied vs skipped revisions
- Stats.merge() method for aggregating across multiple files
- Performance metrics: elapsed time and lines/sec

Summary output shows:
  - Files: processed, modified, unchanged (multi-file mode)
  - Blocks: found, processed, skipped
  - Revisions: applied, skipped
  - Time: elapsed ms and lines/sec throughput

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
